packageRules.description: Pin to <=2.4.6: 2.4.7/2.4.8 introduced a regression (vuejs/test-utils#2700) where the onUnmount wrapper-removal hook fires after @testing-library/vue has already detached the element, producing NotFoundError on Node 24. Re-enable once 2.4.9 ships with the fix from vuejs/test-utils#2830.
